content.full_text:
April 19, 1991

Mr. Kevin Braaten-Moen  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Braaten-Moen:

I am seeking written confirmation of advice you gave me on the telephone on April 19, 1991.

You told me that I could transfer campaign debt from our "Carole Migden for Supervisor 1991" (ID#892226) bank account to our "Friends of Carole Migden" officeholder account. The only outstanding debt is owed to the Supervisor herself.

When I transfer the debt, I will report the transfer as an outstanding loan and campaign debt from another account.

I would appreciate any additional information you might be able to provide to guide us in the transfer.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely yours,

[signature]

Paul Herman  
Legislative Assistant

0478w

cc: Donald Disler, Esq.  
      Randy Riddle, Deputy City Attorney  
      George Beckwith, Assistant District Attorney
